name: QwenPaw Evolution
description: A product-level self-evolution plugin exclusively for QwenPaw. Provides non-intrusive skill evolution, proactive dream cycles, and a built-in Security Shield.
author: QwenPaw Evolution Team

features: Self-Evolving: Automatically creates and installs new skills
Non-intrusive Hook: No modification to official skill.json
Proactive Dream Loop: Automated history audit & wiki update
Security Shield: Static AST audit for AI-generated code
Native QwenPaw Support: Optimized for v1.1.0+ environment
Agent Isolation: Private skill directories per agent
